Presumed to be a Red Rome apple tree. Former homeowner was happy to let us pick the apples, but has now moved into assisted living. Have not met current owner. Be sure to ask before you pick. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Wild grapes. Small fruit. Growing on fence along path, but on private property Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
